customer_message: I updated my password yesterday but I still can't log in to my account. The reset email works, but after setting a new password it says invalid credentials.
I withdrew funds two days ago and still don't see them in my bank account. Can you check what's happening?
Your mobile site is slow on my phone and the chart sometimes freezes when I switch tabs.
What documents do I need to verify my account if my address changed recently?
Please close my account permanently. I no longer want to use this service.
It would be great if dark mode was available in the dashboard.
